flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Juniata College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($51.1k → $58.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Juniata College rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($27.6k → $31.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Juniata College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (68.9% vs 75.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Juniata College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).
